name: Shrimp Scampi
recipeIngredient: About 3/4 lb raw shrimp, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the shrimp dry with paper towels and set aside.
2. Melt butter in a wide frying pan over medium heat.
3. Stir in green onion, oil, garlic, lemon juice, and salt until bubbly.
4. Add shrimp to the pan and cook, stirring occasionally, until they turn pink (about 4-5 minutes).
5. Stir in parsley, lemon peel, and hot pepper seasoning. Serves 2.
